policies: Agent must clearly explain that pre-existing conditions have a 24-month waiting period.
Agent must confirm the customer understands the 15-day free-look period for canceling the policy.
Agent must never guarantee approval before medical underwriting.

transcript:
Agent: Welcome to SafeLife Shield. This new health plan covers everything from day one, there is absolutely no waiting period even for pre-existing conditions.
Customer: Wow, really? Even for my asthma?
Agent: Yes, absolutely! Plus, we have guaranteed approval if you give me your card details on today's call.
